lines.speaker: Kjedelig Uppsen
lines.text: Ho, [Fremennik name]! The brave warrior returns!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was a hard-fought battle, but we Fremennik prevailed!

lines.speaker: Kjedelig Uppsen
lines.text: I expect we'll be hearing songs about the 'Slayer of the Troll King' for many years to come.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It would be an honour to be remembered in such a way! Thanks.
